zh.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne是F de Brionne和wife F De Brionne的女兒，於大約0978年出生在法國諾門迪艾布利奧安。她和Balderic the Teuton至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1053年之後在法國諾門迪奧內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aubrée
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

variants.name: Aubree
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne was born about 0978, in Brionne, Eure, Normandy, France as the daughter of F de Brionne and wife F De Brionne. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Balderic the Teuton. She died after 1053, in Orne, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne est née environ 0978, à Brionne, Eure, Normandie, France, fille de F de Brionne et wife F De Brionne. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Balderic the Teuton. Elle est décédée après 1053, à Orne, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne wurde um 0978 in Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich, als Tochter von F de Brionne und wife F De Brionne geboren. Sie hatte mit Balderic the Teuton mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1053 in Orne, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne è nata il circa 0978 nel Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Francia come figlia di F de Brionne e wife F De Brionne. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Balderic the Teuton. Morì dopo il 1053, nel Orne, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionneは約0978年にフランスノーマンディエウアブリオンでF de Brionneとwife F De Brionneの娘として生まれた。彼女はBalderic the Teutonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1053年以後にフランスノーマンディオルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne(은)는 대략 0978년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브리오니에서 F de Brionne(와)과 wife F De Brionne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Balderic the Teuton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1053년 이후 프랑스 노먼디 른에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne nasceu aproximadamente 0978, em Brionne, Eure, Normandie, França filha de F de Brionne e wife F De Brionne. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Balderic the Teuton. Ela faleceu após 1053, em Orne, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne родилась около 0978 г. в местности брионн, эур, норманди, Франция. Её родителей звали F de Brionne и wife F De Brionne. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Balderic the Teuton. Она умерла после 1053 г. в местности орн, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Aubrée or Alix de Brionne nació aproximadamente 0978, en Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Francia como hija de F de Brionne y wife F De Brionne. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Balderic the Teuton. Murió después de 1053, en Orne, Normandie, Francia.
